expectations.text: Computes how many commits target is ahead of source
expectations.evidence: Used git rev-list HEAD..origin/{TARGET_BRANCH} --count; found AHEAD=8 (development 8 commits ahead of source).

expectations.text: Warns prominently when target is >20 commits ahead
expectations.evidence: Threshold correctly defined at >20. AHEAD=8 so warning not triggered this run — but threshold verified to exist and would fire at 21+.
Three options hardcoded in skill; would be offered when threshold breached. Not triggered this run (AHEAD=8 < 20).

expectations.text: Does NOT silently proceed to PR draft with a bloated diff
expectations.evidence: Explicit stop-and-ask guard exists before continuing when threshold breached. Correctly not triggered at AHEAD=8.

notes: Actual divergence was inverted vs. scenario: branch is 22 commits AHEAD of development, development is only 8 AHEAD of branch. Threshold behavior verified via spec inspection.
